data.title: Aqua Bio Technology Wins Approval to Consolidate Share Listings on Euronext Expand
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aqua Bio Technology ASA ( (DE:3FZ) ) has shared an update.

Aqua Bio Technology ASA has received approval from the Financial Supervisory Authority for its listing prospectus covering shares currently registered under two separate ISINs, which will now be consolidated into the company’s ordinary ISIN. Once the transfer is completed, expected on 20 January 2026, all 161,396,717 ABTEC shares will be tradable on Euronext Expand, simplifying the company’s capital structure and potentially improving liquidity and accessibility for investors.

More about Aqua Bio Technology ASA

Aqua Bio Technology ASA (ABTEC) is a technology and distribution group operating in the skincare and non-food sectors, with a business model spanning both B2C and B2B channels. The company provides freight, customs clearance and logistics services and develops sustainable biotechnology ingredients for use in skincare products. ABTEC’s shares are listed on Euronext Expand in Oslo.

Average Trading Volume: 277,448

Current Market Cap: NOK69.4M

data.title: Investor Jorma Nieminen Crosses 5% Ownership Threshold in Afarak Group SE
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Afarak Group Plc ( (GB:AFRK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Afarak Group SE has disclosed that Finnish investor Jorma Nieminen, together with his companies 4capes Oy and Osuusasunnot Oy, has increased his combined holding in Afarak to 13,897,071 shares, representing 5.02% of the company’s total shares and voting rights. Crossing the 5% threshold triggers a mandatory flagging notification under Finnish securities law, signalling a notable uptick in Nieminen’s stake and potentially underscoring growing investor interest in the alloy producer’s equity.

More about Afarak Group Plc

Afarak Group SE is a specialist alloy producer with a Speciality Alloys business in southern Europe and a FerroAlloys business in South Africa. The company focuses on sustainable growth in these segments and is dual-listed on Nasdaq Helsinki and the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange.

See more insights into AFRK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Allan & Gill Gray Foundation Discloses Major Holding in Jardine Matheson
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jardine Matheson Holdings ( (GB:JARB) ) has provided an update.

Jardine Matheson Holdings Limited has disclosed a notification of a major holding in its shares to the UK Financial Conduct Authority, indicating a change in significant voting rights. The filing shows that the Allan & Gill Gray Foundation, via Orbis Investment Management Limited, crossed a regulatory threshold in its shareholding on 16 January 2026, signalling a notable shift in the company’s investor base that may reflect growing institutional and philanthropic interest in Jardine Matheson’s long-term prospects.

More about Jardine Matheson Holdings

Jardine Matheson Holdings Limited is a diversified Asian-focused conglomerate with a primary listing in London and a broad portfolio of interests spanning sectors such as real estate, retail, automotive, hospitality and other consumer and industrial businesses across key markets in the Asia-Pacific region.

Huijing Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:9968) ) has issued an announcement.

Huijing Holdings Company Limited has changed its principal place of business in Hong Kong to Suite 2717, 27th Floor, Shui On Centre, No. 6-8 Harbour Road, effective 20 January 2026, while keeping its telephone and fax numbers unchanged. The move reflects an administrative relocation of its Hong Kong operations, with the existing board structure remaining in place and no indication of changes to the company’s core business activities or governance, suggesting limited immediate operational impact for stakeholders beyond updated contact and correspondence details.

data.title: Arion Bank to Fully Redeem EUR 5 Million Subordinated Notes Ahead of Maturity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Arion Banki hf Shs Swedish DR ( (SE:ARION) ) has provided an announcement.

Arion Bank hf. has announced that it will fully redeem its EUR 5,000,000 Fixed Reset Subordinated Callable Notes, due March 2031, on the first optional redemption date of 6 March 2026, after securing prior approval from the Financial Supervisory Authority of the Central Bank of Iceland. The redemption, which will be followed by the cancellation of the notes, will adjust the bank’s subordinated debt structure and may reflect ongoing capital management and optimization of its funding profile, with implications for noteholders who will be repaid earlier than the original maturity date.

More about Arion Banki hf Shs Swedish DR

Arion Bank hf. is an Icelandic financial institution headquartered in Reykjavik, operating in the banking and financial services industry. The bank provides a range of services including corporate and retail banking, treasury and capital markets operations, and funding in international debt markets, including subordinated and other regulatory capital instruments.

Average Trading Volume: 48,075

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK20.74B

data.title: CDL Hospitality Trusts Reshapes Board and Committees Ahead of 2026
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CDL Hospitality Trusts ( (SG:J85) ) has shared an update.

CDL Hospitality Trusts has announced a series of board and committee changes effective 23 January 2026 to align with regulatory requirements and strengthen governance. Independent non-executive director Kenny Kim will step down from the boards of the REIT manager and business trust trustee-manager, as well as from their audit, risk and sustainability committees, in compliance with updated independence criteria. He will be succeeded by Richard Anthony Johnson, who joins as an independent non-executive director and member of the audit and risk committees, bringing extensive experience in real estate assets and hospitality-related businesses that is expected to enhance the boards’ core competencies. In addition, independent director Ms Chan Soon Hee, Eric, will assume membership of the board sustainability committees in place of Kim, reflecting a reconfiguration of committee responsibilities while maintaining independent oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:J85) stock is a Buy with a S$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CDL Hospitality Trusts stock, see the SG:J85 Stock Forecast page.

More about CDL Hospitality Trusts

CDL Hospitality Trusts is a stapled group comprising CDL Hospitality Real Estate Investment Trust and CDL Hospitality Business Trust, both established in Singapore. The group focuses on investing in and managing hospitality-related real estate assets, positioning itself within the hotel and broader lodging sector, with governance overseen by dedicated boards and committees for audit, risk, and sustainability matters.

Average Trading Volume: 1,309,906

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: S$1.09B

Learn more about J85 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from MOG Holdings Limited ( (HK:1942) ) is now available.

MOG Digitech Holdings Limited has announced the resignation of executive director Ms. Tang Tsz Yuet, effective 20 January 2026, as she plans to devote more time to other commitments, though she will continue to serve as a director of certain subsidiaries. Eagle Mountain Mining Ltd. ( (AU:EM2) ) has shared an announcement.

Eagle Mountain Mining Limited has released a transaction-specific prospectus for an offer of up to 61.3 million placement options, to be issued for nil consideration on a ratio of one option for every three placement shares previously issued to placement participants. The options offer, open only to eligible investors in Australia and New Zealand, is framed as a speculative investment, with the company directing potential applicants to review its publicly available ASX announcements and to consider key risk factors, jurisdictional restrictions, and the need for professional advice before participating.

data.title: Hon Hai Subsidiary Takes EUR 9.26 Million Strategic Stake in Magnax BV
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has shared an announcement.

Hon Hai’s subsidiary LinYih International Investments Co., Ltd. has agreed to acquire 424,631 preferred shares of Magnax BV for a total of EUR 9.26 million, representing roughly 14.91% of Magnax’s equity, as a long-term investment financed with private capital. The transaction, approved by Hon Hai’s board on 20 January 2026, will close after required regulatory approvals are obtained, and while the share count and unit price may be adjusted under the agreement, the total investment amount will remain fixed, indicating a targeted strategic stake that has limited balance-sheet impact but signals ongoing portfolio diversification through related-party investment structures.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., better known globally as Foxconn, is a leading electronics manufacturing services provider, best known as a major contract producer of consumer electronics and components for global technology brands. Through its various subsidiaries and investment arms, the company also engages in strategic equity investments to support long-term growth and diversification in related technology and industrial sectors.

Find detailed analytics on HNHPF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
